fallback_issues.reason: ACM DL direct proceedings pages reject automated fetches with HTTP 403, ACM Crossref event metadata for KDD 2026 currently returns only two exact event proceedings-article records, and KDD 2026 OpenReview track groups currently expose no accepted notes. DBLP exposes 256 DOI-bearing KDD 2026 records, so DBLP is retained as the best complete machine-readable fallback until ACM or OpenReview metadata is complete.
evidence: ACM DL DOI proceedings pages returned HTTP 403 during automated checks.
Crossref exact event query for "KDD '26: The 32nd ACM SIGKDD Conference on Knowledge Discovery and Data Mining" returned only two relevant proceedings-article records.
OpenReview content.venueid queries for KDD.org/2026 Research, ADS, Datasets and Benchmark, and AI4Sciences tracks returned zero notes.
DBLP TOC https://dblp.org/db/conf/kdd/kdd2026-1.xml contains 256 KDD 2026 paper records with ACM DOI links.
